assumptions: The declared intragroup dividend has created a recognised monetary receivable/payable between group entities with different functional currencies.
The related exchange differences are not fully eliminated on consolidation and can affect consolidated profit or loss.

approaches.label: Foreign currency hedge of the recognised intragroup monetary item
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 provides a formal hedge designation route for the foreign currency risk of an intragroup monetary item in consolidated financial statements when the exchange differences are not fully eliminated, and that risk can be designated as a separately identifiable and reliably measurable hedged component.
